current_tool_status: Performance review module is outdated — no continuous feedback, only annual cycles
No built-in eNPS or pulse survey tooling
Onboarding workflows require manual setup per new hire — no templates
UK payroll integration with PayAxis requires a middleware connector that breaks quarterly
GDPR right-to-erasure requests must be handled manually via support ticket
notes: Caveat: Competitor's native UK payroll sync has lead time; PayAxis integration via certified connector untested
